name: MiniMax M2.1
tagline: Large multilingual-coding gains (Rust, Java, Go, C++, Kotlin, etc.
metaDescription: MiniMax M2.1 (MiniMax), released 2025-12-23 — part of the MiniMax M-Series line. Large multilingual-coding gains (Rust, Java, Go, C++, Kotlin, etc.); SWE-bench…
overview: MiniMax M2.1 is a large language model from MiniMax, part of the MiniMax M-Series line. Released 2025-12-23. MiniMax's flagship MoE LLM line built for coding and agentic/tool-use workflows, shipped as fast point releases.
What's notable in this version: Large multilingual-coding gains (Rust, Java, Go, C++, Kotlin, etc.); SWE-bench Multilingual 56.5%->72.5%; 230B/10B MoE.
